scroll_found.title: Research the Temple Arms scroll at a Research Pedestal

exotic_weapon.title: Obtain a weapon from a dungeon loot table — not crafted, found in the world

subtitle.text: The fallen civilizations left their weapons where the living would find them. They wanted someone to pick them up.

description: CH.05 · THE TEMPLE ARMS
▸ Every civilization armed itself differently.
The weapons they left in their temples
are better than what you can craft right now.
They were designed for the things that killed them.
Some of those things are still alive.
◈ DUNGEON LOOT WEAPONS
└ Dungeon Now Loading: structured dungeons with
boss rooms containing unique weapon chests
└ RealmRPG Fallen Adventurers: adventurer bodies
carry weapons they died holding
└ Cataclysm: Ignis/Netherite Monstrosity rooms
have pre-fight weapon caches
└ Strongholds: ancient armory rooms with pre-enchanted
weapons from the Scholar civilization
◈ SIMPLY SWORDS + DUNGEON WEAPONS
└ Dungeons Now Loading drops Simply Swords weapons
└ Gem-socketed variants are dungeon-exclusive
└ Some boss rooms drop class-specific weapons
(Forgotten Knight sword, Oni Slayer blade)
◈ SCROLL: The Temple Arms
└ Found in: temple treasure rooms, ancient armory ruins,
crypt weapon caches, boss pre-rooms
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: dungeon weapon loot table awareness,
fallen civilization weapon lore
▸ The last warrior of the Craftsmen civilization
placed their weapon in the temple armory
instead of taking it with them.
They wanted it found by the right person.
Pick it up. Try to be the right person.
▶ Find The Temple Arms scroll [check]
▶ Obtain a weapon from dungeon loot [check]
◇ RealmRPG Fallen Adventurers spawn as world mobs.
They carry gear their previous owner brought.
Fight them carefully — they use it.
